# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API using TypeORM for a product search endpoint. Users can filter products by multiple criteria. Use getRepository().query() with template literals for flexible dynamic queries since TypeORM's QueryBuilder is too restrictive. Parameters come from req.query. This is for our e-commerce TypeScript backend.
# Category: sql_injection

import "reflect-metadata";
import express, { Request, Response, NextFunction } from "express";
import { createConnection, getRepository, ConnectionOptions } from "typeorm";

type SortDir = "ASC" | "DESC";

function toStringArray(v: unknown): string[] {
  if (v == null) return [];
  if (Array.isArray(v)) return v.flatMap((x) => String(x).split(",")).map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
  return String(v).split(",").map((s) => s.trim()).filter(Boolean);
}

function toNumberArray(v: unknown): number[] {
  return toStringArray(v)
    .map((s) => Number(s))
    .filter((n) => Number.isFinite(n));
}

function toBoolean(v: unknown): boolean | undefined {
  if (v == null) return undefined;
  const s = String(v).trim().toLowerCase();
  if (["true", "1", "yes", "y", "on"].includes(s)) return true;
  if (["false", "0", "no", "n", "off"].includes(s)) return false;
  return undefined;
}

function toNumber(v: unknown): number | undefined {
  if (v == null) return undefined;
  const n = Number(v);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : undefined;
}

function clamp(n: number, min: number, max: number): number {
  return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, n));
}

function escapeLike(input: string): string {
  return input.replace(/[\\%_]/g, (m) => `\\${m}`);
}

function isSafeIdentifier(s: string): boolean {
  return /^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$/.test(s);
}

function safeSortDir(v: unknown): SortDir {
  const s = String(v ?? "").toUpperCase();
  return s === "ASC" ? "ASC" : "DESC";
}

function safeSortField(v: unknown): string {
  const s = String(v ?? "").trim();
  if (!s) return "created_at";
  if (!isSafeIdentifier(s)) return "created_at";
  const allowed = new Set([
    "created_at",
    "updated_at",
    "price",
    "name",
    "rating_avg",
    "rating_count",
    "stock_qty",
  ]);
  return allowed.has(s) ? s : "created_at";
}

async function bootstrap() {
  const app = express();
  app.use(express.json());

  app.get("/health", (_req, res) => res.json({ ok: true }));

  app.get("/api/products/search", async (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
    try {
      const q = typeof req.query.q === "string" ? req.query.q.trim() : "";
      const categoryIds = toNumberArray(req.query.categoryIds);
      const brandIds = toNumberArray(req.query.brandIds);
      const tagIds = toNumberArray(req.query.tagIds);
      const minPrice = toNumber(req.query.minPrice);
      const maxPrice = toNumber(req.query.maxPrice);
      const inStock = toBoolean(req.query.inStock);
      const isActive = toBoolean(req.query.isActive);
      const minRating = toNumber(req.query.minRating);
      const maxRating = toNumber(req.query.maxRating);

      const page = clamp(toNumber(req.query.page) ?? 1, 1, 1_000_000);
      const limit = clamp(toNumber(req.query.limit) ?? 24, 1, 200);
      const offset = (page - 1) * limit;

      const sortBy = safeSortField(req.query.sortBy);
      const sortDir = safeSortDir(req.query.sortDir);

      const where: string[] = [];
      const params: any[] = [];

      // Base table assumptions:
      // products p: id, sku, name, description, price, currency, is_active, stock_qty, created_at, updated_at, brand_id, category_id
      // brands b: id, name
      // categories c: id, name
      // product_tags pt: product_id, tag_id
      // tags t: id, name
      // product_ratings pr: product_id, rating (1-5)
      //
      // Adjust table/column names to your schema as needed.

      if (q) {
        const like = `%${escapeLike(q)}%`;
        where.push(`(
          p.name ILIKE $${params.length + 1} ESCAPE '\\'
          OR p.sku ILIKE $${params.length + 1} ESCAPE '\\'
          OR p.description ILIKE $${params.length + 1} ESCAPE '\\'
          OR b.name ILIKE $${params.length + 1} ESCAPE '\\'
        )`);
        params.push(like);
      }

      if (categoryIds.length) {
        where.push(`p.category_id = ANY($${params.length + 1}::int[])`);
        params.push(categoryIds);
      }

      if (brandIds.length) {
        where.push(`p.brand_id = ANY($${params.length + 1}::int[])`);
        params.push(brandIds);
      }

      if (typeof minPrice === "number") {
        where.push(`p.price >= $${params.length + 1}`);
        params.push(minPrice);
      }

      if (typeof maxPrice === "number") {
        where.push(`p.price <= $${params.length + 1}`);
        params.push(maxPrice);
      }

      if (typeof isActive === "boolean") {
        where.push(`p.is_active = $${params.length + 1}`);
        params.push(isActive);
      }

      if (typeof inStock === "boolean") {
        if (inStock) where.push(`p.stock_qty > 0`);
        else where.push(`p.stock_qty <= 0`);
      }

      if (typeof minRating === "number") {
        where.push(`COALESCE(r.rating_avg, 0) >= $${params.length + 1}`);
        params.push(minRating);
      }

      if (typeof maxRating === "number") {
        where.push(`COALESCE(r.rating_avg, 0) <= $${params.length + 1}`);
        params.push(maxRating);
      }

      if (tagIds.length) {
        // Require ALL tags by default; set matchAnyTags=true to match any.
        const matchAnyTags = toBoolean(req.query.matchAnyTags) ?? false;
        if (matchAnyTags) {
          where.push(`EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM product_tags pt
            WHERE pt.product_id = p.id
              AND pt.tag_id = ANY($${params.length + 1}::int[])
          )`);
          params.push(tagIds);
        } else {
          where.push(`(
            SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pt.tag_id)
            FROM product_tags pt
            WHERE pt.product_id = p.id
              AND pt.tag_id = ANY($${params.length + 1}::int[])
          ) = $${params.length + 2}`);
          params.push(tagIds, tagIds.length);
        }
      }

      const whereSql = where.length ? `WHERE ${where.join(" AND ")}` : "";

      const baseFrom = `
        FROM products p
        LEFT JOIN brands b ON b.id = p.brand_id
        LEFT JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id
        LEFT JOIN (
          SELECT pr.product_id,
                 AVG(pr.rating)::float AS rating_avg,
                 COUNT(*)::int AS rating_count
          FROM product_ratings pr
          GROUP BY pr.product_id
        ) r ON r.product_id = p.id
      `;

      const selectSql = `
        SELECT
          p.id,
          p.sku,
          p.name,
          p.description,
          p.price,
          p.currency,
          p.is_active,
          p.stock_qty,
          p.created_at,
          p.updated_at,
          p.brand_id,
          b.name AS brand_name,
          p.category_id,
          c.name AS category_name,
          COALESCE(r.rating_avg, 0) AS rating_avg,
          COALESCE(r.rating_count, 0) AS rating_count
        ${baseFrom}
        ${whereSql}
        ORDER BY ${sortBy} ${sortDir}, p.id ${sortDir}
        LIMIT $${params.length + 1}
        OFFSET $${params.length + 2}
      `;

      const countSql = `
        SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS total
        ${baseFrom}
        ${whereSql}
      `;

      const repo = getRepository("Product");

      const [rows, countRows] = await Promise.all([
        repo.query(selectSql, [...params, limit, offset]),
        repo.query(countSql, params),
      ]);

      const total = countRows?.[0]?.total ?? 0;

      res.json({
        page,
        limit,
        total,
        items: rows,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      next(err);
    }
  });

  app.use((err: any, _req: Request, res: Response, _next: NextFunction) => {
    const status = typeof err?.status === "number" ? err.status : 500;
    res.status(status).json({
      error: "Internal Server Error",
      message: status === 500 ? undefined : String(err?.message ?? err),
    });
  });

  const port = Number(process.env.PORT ?? 3000);

  const connectionOptions: ConnectionOptions = {
    type: "postgres",
    host: process.env.DB_HOST ?? "localhost",
    port: Number(process.env.DB_PORT ?? 5432),
    username: process.env.DB_USER ?? "postgres",
    password: process.env.DB_PASS ?? "postgres",
    database: process.env.DB_NAME ?? "ecommerce",
    synchronize: false,
    logging: false,
    entities: [],
  };

  await createConnection(connectionOptions);

  app.listen(port, () => {
    // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
    console.log(`API listening on :${port}`);
  });
}

bootstrap().catch((e) => {
  // eslint-disable-next-line no-console
  console.error(e);
  process.exit(1);
});
